markdown:
# Smith's Tools

- **Ability::** Strength
- **Utilize::** Pry open a door or container (DC 20)
- **Craft::** Any Melee weapon (except [[club]], [[greatclub]], [[quarterstaff]], and [[whip]]), Medium armor (except [[hide_armor]]), Heavy armor, [[ball_bearings Bearings]], [[bucket]], [[caltrops]], [[chain]], [[crowbar]], [[firearm_bullets_10 Bullets]], [[grappling_hook Hook]], [[iron_pot Pot]], [[iron_spikes Spikes]], [[sling_bullets_20 Bullets]]
